first_run.rationale: The score is identical (3/10), and the core reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js), the age and limited scope of their C++ experience, and the mismatch between their GIS data collection background and the role's need for routing pipeline engineering. The differences in wording are minor, rephrasing the same concepts, and fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation. There is no evidence that the change in location from Berlin to San Francisco influenced the assessment.
